title: senecio johnstonii var. cottonii
intro: Senecio johnstonii var. cottonii, also known as the Cotton Bush or Cotton Senecio, is a rare and unique succulent plant native to Australia. It is a member of the daisy family and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal Australian medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Senecio johnstonii var. cottonii can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and have been used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
